benefits.description: Significant appetite suppression on first day at 1mg dose

side_effects.description: Appetite skyrocketed at 2mg dose; increased caloric intake from typical 1.5-2k cal/day to 2-2.5k cal/day, with one day reaching 3k cal

protocol_notes: Started at 1mg dose with initial appetite suppression (ate ~1k cal on day 1). After 4 days, dose increased to 2mg with no reported side effects at increase, but appetite increased shortly after. User reports typically tracking calories and definitely noticed the jump. Expressed interest in increasing to 3-4mg to find balance for appetite suppression.
